mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, password_hash, real_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id
SELECT id, username, real_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, username, real_name, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.id
